cards.title: Open the Tab Card
cards.alt: A pink 90s desk scene about opening the AI tab anyway
cards.prompt: Open the tool and ask it to help with one real work thing for ten minutes.
cards.reward: Collected when you stop waiting for the perfect on-ramp and start with the tab.

cards.title: Small Sips Card
cards.alt: A pink 9 to 5 workday scene with notes, coffee, and AI practice energy
cards.prompt: Do one small AI experiment instead of turning learning into a second unpaid job.
cards.reward: Collected when ten useful minutes beat a fantasy weekend that never arrives.

cards.title: Cher Closet Card
cards.alt: A stylish 90s inspired phone and desk scene with pop culture references
cards.prompt: Name one place where AI could work like Cher's closet computer: practical, visual, and actually helpful.
cards.reward: Collected when the technology stops feeling sterile and starts feeling like a tool you can dress properly.

cards.title: Judgment Card
cards.alt: A pink corporate desk scene about deciding what is ready to send
cards.prompt: Use AI for a draft, then make one human judgment call before anything leaves your laptop.
cards.reward: Collected when the machine helps, but you still decide what is worth sending.

cards.title: Room Key Card
cards.unlockTitle: Bring one question to the room.
cards.prompt: Share where you are starting, what you are trying, or what feels confusing.
cards.reward: Collected when learning stops being a solo spiral and starts becoming a group chat with receipts.

cards.title: Specificity Card
cards.alt: A neon pink trading card scene with a note that says Be Specific
cards.prompt: Turn one vague ask into the painfully specific version and share the before-and-after.
cards.reward: Collected when you make the work clearer instead of making the meeting longer.

cards.title: Girl Power Prompt
cards.alt: A bright Y2K trading card scene with two women improving a prompt together
cards.unlockTitle: Fix one prompt in the room.
cards.prompt: Help another member add audience, context, constraints, or a good example.
cards.reward: Collected when the group chat gets more useful because you showed your work.

cards.title: Try-On Card
cards.alt: A pastel board game trading card scene with a spinner, rings, and a Try It On note
cards.prompt: Complete the prompt, revise once, and post what changed after the second pass.
cards.reward: Collected when you test the thing instead of saving the article forever.

cards.title: Rewrite Remix
cards.alt: A glam Y2K trading card scene with a laptop, flip phone, and three rewrite cards
cards.prompt: Use AI to make one draft direct, warmer, and executive-clean. Keep the version with judgment.
cards.reward: Collected when the first draft finds a stylist and a spine.

cards.title: Receipts Card
cards.alt: A pink evidence desk trading card scene with a magnifying glass and receipts note
cards.prompt: Catch one AI answer that needs a citation, correction, date check, or better receipt.
cards.reward: Collected when you remember the machine can be wrong in a blazer.

cards.title: Receipts Check
cards.alt: A pink evidence desk trading card scene with a magnifying glass and receipts note
cards.prompt: Take one AI answer and verify three claims: a name, a date, a number, a link, or a quote.
cards.reward: Collected when the answer stops relying on confidence and starts showing receipts.

cards.title: Burn Book Entry
cards.alt: A pink corporate desk scene about deciding what is ready to send
cards.prompt: Post a questionable AI answer in the Burn Book and mark exactly what needs checking.
cards.reward: Collected when you turn a weird answer into a teachable receipt check.

cards.title: High-Stakes Filter
cards.alt: A pink 9 to 5 workday scene with notes, coffee, and AI practice energy
cards.unlockTitle: Know when not to wing it.
cards.prompt: Name one work topic where you would never use AI output without human or source review.
cards.reward: Collected when you protect your name, your team, and the budget.

cards.title: Polished Wrong
cards.alt: A glam Y2K trading card scene with a laptop, flip phone, and three rewrite cards
cards.prompt: Find one sentence that sounds good, then check whether it is actually accurate.
cards.reward: Collected when the pretty sentence survives the fact check.

cards.title: Source Stylist
cards.alt: A neon pink trading card scene with a note that says Be Specific
cards.prompt: Revise a prompt so AI must separate what it knows, what it assumes, and what needs verification.
cards.reward: Collected when your prompt makes uncertainty visible instead of hiding it under lip gloss.
